Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,140 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class export
+- Internal names noticed: Hono (from hono.ts)
+- Imports or neighbors: hono.ts, types.ts, context.ts, request.ts, client/
+- Plain-English summary: Barrel export module, re-exports main Hono class and key types from submodules
+- Copy-safe detail: Lines 17-52, exports Hono and type aliases, 53 total lines
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: Env, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, Input, Schema exports
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPResponseError, ErrorHandler, HTTPException references
+- Imports or neighbors: context.ts, request.ts, utils/headers.ts, utils/http-status.ts, utils/types.ts, hono-base.ts, context.ts, request.ts
+- Plain-English summary: Core type definitions for Hono framework including handlers, requests, responses and environment bindings
+- Copy-safe detail: Interface and type exports throughout, 1310 total lines
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class
+- Internal names noticed: HonoOptions, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, env
+- Imports or neighbors: hono-base.ts, router/reg-exp-router.ts, router/smart-router.ts, router/trie-router.ts, types.ts
+- Plain-English summary: Main Hono application class with router initialization and constructor
+- Copy-safe detail: Lines 1-34, extends HonoBase, sets up default router, 34 total lines
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class
+- Internal names noticed: passThroughOnException, error property, FetchEvent, ExecutionContext, finalized, req
+- Imports or neighbors: request.ts, types.ts, utils/html.ts, utils/http-status.ts, utils/mime.ts, router.ts
+- Plain-English summary: Request context class with handler execution, response storage and event handling capabilities
+- Copy-safe detail: Class definition lines 293-500+, context handling, middleware dispatch integration
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest class
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPException, GET_MATCH_RESULT, validatedData, matchResult, raw, path, text(), json(), body(), headers, form(), param
+- Imports or neighbors: http-exception.ts, request/constants.ts, router/result.ts, types.ts, utils/body.ts, utils/headers.ts, utils/url.ts, body.ts
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP request wrapper with method chain parsing (text, json, body, formData) and validation support
+- Copy-safe detail: Lines 36-490, HonoRequest class with body parsing and validation targets
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT symbol
+- Internal names noticed: GET_MATCH_RESULT (unique symbol)
+- Imports or neighbors: none
+- Plain-English summary: Single symbol export for matching route results
+- Copy-safe detail: Line 1, single constant export, 1 total line
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: Body parsing types
+- Internal names noticed: BodyDataValueDot, BodyDataValueDotAll, SimplifyBodyData, BodyDataValueComponent, BodyDataValueObject, BodyDataValue, HonoRequest
+- Imports or neighbors: request.ts
+- Plain-English summary: Type definitions for request body data structures and parsing options
+- Copy-safe detail: Type definitions for body parsing, 45+ total lines
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose middleware function
+- Internal names noticed: dispatch, index, ErrorHandler, NotFoundHandler, context
+- Imports or neighbors: context.ts, types.ts
+- Plain-English summary: Middleware execution wrapper using Koa-style compose pattern with error and not-found handlers
+- Copy-safe detail: Lines 15-73, dispatch function with index tracking and handler execution
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException class
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPExceptionOptions, ContentfulStatusCode, getResponse method
+- Imports or neighbors: utils/http-status.ts
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP error class for throwing authentication failures and other 5xx/4xx errors
+- Copy-safe detail: Lines 22-75, class with status and response object, 75 total lines
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: hc client factory
+- Internal names noticed: hc, parseResponse, DetailedError (from utils)
+- Imports or neighbors: client/(client.ts, types.ts, utils.ts, fetch-result-please.ts)
+- Plain-English summary: Client API re-export module for HC (HTTP client) functionality
+- Copy-safe detail: Barrel export for hc, parseResponse, DetailedError client exports
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: hc function, ClientRequestImpl class
+- Internal names noticed: createProxy, ClientRequestImpl, buildSearchParams, deepMerge, mergePath, removeIndexString, replaceUrlParam, replaceUrlProtocol
+- Imports or neighbors: hono.ts, types.ts, utils/cookie.ts, client/types.ts, client/utils.ts
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP client implementation with proxy-based request API and path building helpers
+- Copy-safe detail: hc function, ClientRequestImpl class with path/method/url caching
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: hc type signature, ClientRequestOptions, Client, ClientRequest, ClientResponse
+- Internal names noticed: BuildSearchParamsFn, Callback, Fetch, ClientRequestOptions, ClientResponse, FetchResult, FilterClientResponseByStatusCode, ApplyGlobalResponse, DetailedError
+- Imports or neighbors: client/client.ts
+- Plain-English summary: Type definitions for HTTP client including request/response types and builder functions
+- Copy-safe detail: Generic type signatures for Client/Request/Response, 400+ lines
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: parseResponse, mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge
+- Internal names noticed: DetailedError, mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge, isObject
+- Imports or neighbors: utils/http-status.ts, client/fetch-result-please.ts, client/types.ts
+- Plain-English statement: Client utility functions for request building, URL manipulation and response parsing
+- Copy-safe detail: 8 utility functions exported, response parsing with DetailedError
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Public surface: fetchRP, DetailedError
+- Internal names mentioned: nullBodyResponses, detectResponseType, jsonRegex
+- Imports or neighbors: None standalone
+- Plain-English summary: Minimal response parsing layer adapting ofetch for Hono client needs
+- Copy-safe detail: 95 lines, fetchRP async function throws DetailedError for bad responses
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+- Public surface: FetchEvent interface
+- Internal names noticed: ExtendableEvent, FetchEvent, clientId, preloadResponse, resultingClientId, respondWith
+- Imports or neighbors: None standalone
+- Plain-English summary: Type definitions for FetchEvent and event-like interface
+- Copy-safe detail: 14 lines, FetchEvent interface extends ExtendableEvent
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- Public surface: handle function
+- Internal names noticed: FetchEvent, HandleOptions, respondWith
+- Imports or neighbors: service-worker/types.ts, hono.ts, types.ts
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker adapter handler that wraps Hono app for fetch events
+- Copy-safe detail: 37 lines, handle function returns Handler type, binds to evt.respondWith
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- Public surface: fire function
+- Internal names noticed: handle, fire, addEventListener
+- Imports or neighbors: hono.ts, types.ts, handler.ts
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker adapter exports fire function to register Hono app with worker
+- Copy-safe detail: 36 lines, fire function registers addEventListener for fetch event
+
+## Path Inventory
+- src/index.ts
+- src/types.ts
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/context.ts
+- src/request.ts
+- src/request/constants.ts
+- src/utils/body.ts
+- src/compose.ts
+- src/http-exception.ts
+- src/client/index.ts
+- src/client/client.ts
+- src/client/types.ts
+- src/client/utils.ts
+- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."

The user wants me to create a benchmark artifact file that analyzes the source code of the honojs/hono repository. I need to:

1. Create the bench-artifacts directory if it doesn't exist
2. Read all the listed files in the repository
3. Create a markdown file with a consistent format for each file
4. Include specific sections for each file

Let me start by creating the directory and then reading all the files. The files to read are listed in the task.
